3230790.name: Cosmi: Forbidden Forests
3230790.description:
A celebration of pioneering 1980s games, this new-and-old collection of classic C64™ games originally published by Cosmi includes a medieval styled remake of Forbidden Forest with all new graphics and audio, new comic book stories and remade box art, plus a trove of archival bonus material!

Cosmi: Forbidden Forests includes everything from pick-up-and-play shooters and platformers to adventure and simulation games with surprising depth. The games included are Forbidden Forest, Beyond the Forbidden Forest, Aztec Challenge, Caverns of Khafka, Seal, Delta Man, Chomp!, Chernobyl: Nuclear Power Plant Simulation, Spite & Malice, and Navcom 6: The Persian Gulf Defense.

Features

  • 10 legendary games from the C64 era, including hits by master game designer Paul Norman.

  • A bardcore-inspired Remake of Forbidden Forest with the ability to switch between the remade and original version in real time as you play.

  • Digital Comics by Andy Lanning and Ant Williams bringing the world of the games to life.

  • Save States and Rewind features powered by the Arsenal Engine.

  • Digital gallery of development artifacts and advertisements from the original release of the games.
